command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e6qeZQ9RRN5ZtzL.187ccab2ac56 --database dAVBxpSeSZ4jhwmMBJquFo --execute 
-- Search for Scoop Duke by name
SELECT id, businessName, contactEmail, tier, isExempt, userId FROM partners 
WHERE businessName LIKE '%scoop%' OR businessName LIKE '%duke%' OR contactEmail LIKE '%scoop%' OR contactEmail LIKE '%duke%'
LIMIT 10;

-- Also check the users table for the owner
SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users LIMIT 10;
